elements.title: You are walking through the woods and you&#x27;re pretty relaxed. What could happen to you here?
elements.value:
OH NOOOOOO You are walking through the woods and you're pretty relaxed. What could happen to you here?
Plenty. There's a path to your left and a path to your right. From the left comes sounds of strange animals. From the right comes human voices, but babbling incoherently with occasional wild psychotic screaming. Great choices! What now, hotshot....?
elements.html: OH NOOOOOO You are walking through the woods and you're pretty relaxed. What could happen to you here? Plenty. There's a path to your left and a path to your right.
